"/home/bmo/BMO-Project/BMO Face Engine/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/em++" -O3 -DNDEBUG -sWASM=1 -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -sMIN_WEBGL_VERSION=2 -sMAX_WEBGL_VERSION=2 -sASYNCIFY -sASYNCIFY_STACK_SIZE=65536 -sENVIRONMENT=web -sASSERTIONS=1 -sDISABLE_EXCEPTION_CATCHING=0 --shell-file /tmp/bmo_shell.html --pre-js "/home/bmo/BMO-Project/BMO Face Engine/gamepad_fix.js" --preload-file /tmp/bmo_assets/assets@assets --preload-file /tmp/bmo_assets/eyes_es.fs@eyes_es.fs --preload-file /tmp/bmo_assets/brow_es.fs@brow_es.fs --preload-file /tmp/bmo_assets/tears_es.fs@tears_es.fs --preload-file /tmp/bmo_assets/mouth_es.fs@mouth_es.fs --preload-file /tmp/bmo_assets/pixelizer_es.fs@pixelizer_es.fs --preload-file /tmp/bmo_assets/face_database.txt@face_database.txt -sUSE_GLFW=3 CMakeFiles/BMO_Engine.dir/src/SFacePoserFinal.cpp.o -o BMO_Engine.html  _deps/raylib-build/raylib/libraylib.a
